summary:
I read the requirements and discovery notes for this task (moving the dark mode toggle into the sidebar footer next to Sign out, a pure view/layout change reusing the existing `_theme_toggle` partial with no backend logic). The `input.json` for this step has no `composition` object, so there's no pinned set to respect — I selected freely from the library, restricted to templates whose phase is `build`, `review`, or null.

Build gets just **Implementer** (the only required build-phase template). Review includes the required **Requirements Conformance Critic**, **Test Critic**, and **Review Report Writer**, plus three conditionals I judged relevant to this specific task: **Guide Alignment Critic** (the constraints explicitly call out mandatory `ui-style-guide.md` compliance — semantic tokens, shared partial reuse, button rules), **Code Quality Critic** (it's a real code change across ERB/layout files), and **UI Test Critic** (it's a UI repositioning change with an existing system test that needs to keep passing and a11y/focus behavior to verify). Each critic routes `needs_work` feedback back to `Implementer`; Review Report Writer runs last with no route since it synthesizes rather than triggers rework. Output written to `.pipeliner/phases/02-plan/main/workflow-composer/output/workflow_plan.json`.
